$comment: Copy to config/telegram.json and fill in. That file is gitignored.
Get your numeric Telegram ID from @userinfobot. IDs are used rather than
@usernames because usernames can be changed and reused; IDs cannot.
The bot REFUSES TO START with an empty allowedUserIds list. An open
custodial bot would let strangers create wallets on your machine.
IMPORTANT: this is a custodial setup. Your machine holds the private keys
for every user listed here. Only invite people who understand that, and
keep defaultCaps low enough that a total loss would be survivable for them.

defaultCaps.$comment: Hard ceilings per user. Cannot be raised from Telegram - only here.
